name: io.github.cliwant/mcp-sam-gov
description: Keyless MCP: 150 tools for US federal + state/local (SLED) contracting, spending & regulation

environmentVariables.name: SAM_GOV_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional. SAM.gov key for higher rate limits + archives older than 12 months. Keyless by default.

environmentVariables.name: CENSUS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional free key for Census business-patterns tools.

environmentVariables.name: FRED_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional free key for FRED economic-series tools.

environmentVariables.name: BEA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional free key for BEA regional/industry economic tools.

environmentVariables.name: BLS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional free key for BLS labor-statistics tools (raises rate limits).

environmentVariables.name: DOL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional free key for DOL data-endpoint tools.

environmentVariables.name: DATA_GOV_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional free api.data.gov key (raises DEMO_KEY limits for DOL/govinfo tools).

environmentVariables.name: NVD_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional free NVD key (raises CVE rate limits).

environmentVariables.name: OPENFDA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional free openFDA key (raises rate limits).

environmentVariables.name: SOCRATA_APP_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional Socrata app token (raises rate limits on SLED Socrata hosts).

environmentVariables.name: COURTLISTENER_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional CourtListener (Free Law Project) token (raises rate limits).

environmentVariables.name: LDA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional Senate LDA lobbying-disclosure key (raises rate limits).

environmentVariables.name: EDGAR_USER_AGENT
environmentVariables.description: Optional SEC EDGAR User-Agent string (courtesy identification; a sensible default is used otherwise).
